title: Teach me Thy way, O Lord
firstLine: Teach me Thy way, O Lord,
publicDomainBasis: Benjamin Mansell Ramsey (1849–1923), Benjamin Mansell Ramsey (1849–1923). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Verse 2
sections.text:
When doubts and fears arise,
Teach me Thy way;
When storms o’erspread the skies,
Teach me Thy way.
Shine through the cloud and rain,
Through sorrow, toil, and pain;
Make Thou my pathway plain,
Teach me Thy way.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Long as my life shall last,
Teach me Thy way;
Where’er my lot be cast,
Teach me Thy way.
Until the race is run,
Until the journey’s done,
Until the crown is won,
Teach me Thy way.
